demographics.audit_notes: Values are plausible for a composite of census tracts 17.11, 17.12, and 17.13, which approximate the Arboretum Area. Provided population is slightly lower than census sum but within an acceptable range.
All values are interpolated between 1990 and 2000 census data points. The linear growth trend appears aggressive but is plausible for Austin's boom in the 1990s.
